siteMetadata.title: Occupy Matrix
siteMetadata.subtitle: Personal blog by Murat Sutunc. I write about business, strategy & code.

frontmatter.title: On Resilience
frontmatter.description: 2018 was a really though one. I failed a lot and to my surprise, even after everything that has happened, life goes on.

frontmatter.title: A different take on luck in life
frontmatter.description: "Your luck" depends on your ability to reverse engineering existing processes and improving the odds. What are you doing about this?

frontmatter.title: Celebrating Codela's First Year 🎂
frontmatter.description: As Codela celebrates it's first year, I wanted to share everything I've learned about the business.
